chooseResponse.q: What time is the meeting scheduled for?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hi, I heard there's a new art exhibit opening this weekend.
Advisor: Yes, it's at the downtown gallery. Are you planning to go?
Student: I think so! What kind of art will be displayed?
Advisor: There will be contemporary pieces from local artists.

questions.q: What is the main topic of this conversation?
questions.explain: 這段對話的主要主題是關於新的藝術展覽。

questions.q: Where is the art exhibit located?
questions.explain: 藝術展覽的地點是在市中心的畫廊。

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The university will host a wellness fair this Friday from 10 AM to 4 PM in the student center. Various health services, fitness demos, and nutrition workshops will be available. Don’t miss this opportunity to learn more about maintaining a healthy lifestyle!

questions.explain: 公告的活動是健康博覽會。

questions.q: When will the wellness fair take place?
questions.explain: 健康博覽會將於本週五舉行。

talk.transcript: Today, I will discuss the importance of biodiversity. Biodiversity refers to the variety of life on Earth, including the number of different species, ecosystems, and genetic variations. It is crucial for ecosystem resilience, providing us with essential services such as clean air, water, and food. High biodiversity helps ecosystems recover from disturbances and adapt to changes. Unfortunately, human activities are threatening biodiversity through habitat destruction, pollution, and climate change. Conserving biodiversity is vital for our survival and the health of our planet.

questions.explain: 生物多樣性是指地球上生命的多樣性。
生物多樣性對於支持生態系統服務是非常重要的。

questions.q: What are some threats to biodiversity mentioned?
questions.explain: 提到的威脅生物多樣性的有人的活動。

questions.q: What can help ecosystems recover from disturbances?
questions.explain: 高生物多樣性有助於生態系統從干擾中恢復。
